hero.title: LibrisArk
hero.subtitle: A Local-First, AI-Enhanced Desktop Literature Management Tool
hero.description: LibrisArk is designed for modern researchers. It solves the pain points of traditional reference managers regarding seamless AI integration, flexible local file management, and strict privacy protection.

features.local_first_desc: Built with Tauri (Rust) and SQLite, ensuring high performance, low memory footprint, and absolute control over your local data.
features.ai_copilot_desc: Instantly generate structured summaries and extract smart tags for any PDF. Chat directly with your papers using a context-aware AI session.
features.privacy_desc: AI chat history is persisted locally. This means no redundant tokens are spent re-reading the same PDF across multiple sessions.
features.modern_ui_desc: A beautiful, responsive interface built with React. Features include a sleek icon-only sidebar, dynamic tag filtering, and a built-in PDF reader.
features.cross_platform_desc: Available for Windows, macOS, and Linux, ensuring you can manage your literature wherever you work.
